parsed.rationale: The Caudal fin is located at the posterior end of the fish skeleton. Visually, the rays extending from the Caudal fin are significantly longer and more numerous than those of the other labeled fins. The Dorsal fin rays are shorter and fewer. The Anal and Pelvic fins have much shorter rays compared to the Caudal fin.
